note: TEL-001 implemented: Bus events now published at all 4 task lifecycle points (running, completed, failed x2). Schema file created. task.ts now emits TaskStatusChanged events via Bus system. Pre-existing TaskStatusChanged event definition in coord-events.ts now has its first subscriber (publisher).
Completed Phase 1 — ToolCache: New ToolCache service (~80 lines), wired into tool.ts/registry.ts/app-runtime.ts, 8 cacheable tools marked, typecheck passes with 0 new errors.

Contention detection implemented. Created contention.ts (267 lines) with in-memory fragment tracking, anchor overlap heuristics (numeric + named), collision Bus events. Added 'contention' operation to CoordinationTool. coord-events.ts consolidated with all 6 event definitions.

Schema definitions verified 100% complete — all 7 SQLite tables have complete Postgres equivalents. The remaining 60% is the application layer migration (production code switching imports from .sql.ts to .pg.sql.ts + dual-write plumbing). Schema layer is ready — deployment layer needs the pipeline work.
Schemas complete. Next step: application layer — switch production imports from .sql.ts to .pg.sql.ts + implement dual-write in the DB adapter layer.
Production Postgres connection pool implemented: PgPool service with retry+error classification, health check, graceful degradation to SQLite, pool config via env vars, and test suite.
PgPool service with retry (3 attempts, exponential backoff), error classification (auth/SSL skip retry), health check (SELECT 1), graceful degradation to SQLite. All 20/20 tests pass.

Session built complete Runtime Event infrastructure: Event Persistence (schema, store, bridge), Timeline Inspector UI (7 components + route), DuckDB Analytics (6 views), Debug Export + Flight Recorder. Pre-fabricated next-wave UX and Agent Workbench lanes.
